seo.title: Contact Caros
seo.description: Contact Caros for bookings, premium vehicle inquiries, support, and transportation assistance with localized help for every need.
seo.og_description: Reach the Caros team for reservations, customer support, WhatsApp inquiries, and premium transportation assistance.

page_hero.title: We're Here To
page_hero.description: Contact our team for bookings, support, or transportation inquiries. We're available around the clock to deliver a smooth premium experience.
page_hero.card_title: Let's discuss your next premium ride.
page_hero.card_description: Whether you need airport transfers, business travel, or special event transportation, our team is ready to help.

info_section.title: Reach Us Anytime
info_section.description: Multiple ways to contact our team whenever you need assistance.

location_section.title: Find Us
location_section.emergency_description: Available anytime for urgent bookings and support.
location_section.support_description: Our team is ready to answer your questions 24/7.

map_section.description: Visit our main office or contact us for coverage across {country}

faq_section.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq_section.description: Find answers to the most common questions about our services.

items.question: How far in advance should I book?
items.answer: We recommend booking at least 24 hours in advance for standard services and 48–72 hours for special events or peak travel periods.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept major credit cards, debit cards, and cash payments. Corporate billing can also be arranged for recurring clients.

items.question: Do you provide airport pickup services?
items.answer: Yes, we provide airport transfers with live flight monitoring to ensure timely pickup even if your flight is delayed.

items.question: What if I need to cancel my booking?
items.answer: Cancellations made at least 24 hours before the scheduled service are free of charge. Late cancellations may include a fee.
